title: How to Build your Account Plan

contentBody.description: Go through how to build an Account Plan at our company

sections.content:
1. Foundational Information:
  • The current state of the customer - How are they currently handling the problem you’re solving for?
  • Challenges
  • What is the main goal of using a solution like yours?
  • Org structure and the different teams you would be involved with
  • Business requirements
2. Compelling Business Trigger:
  • Why now?
  • What keeps them up or stresses them out?
3. Decision Criteria:
  • What can we do to separate ourselves from the competition?
  • What is making them move from their current state?
4. Use Cases for the Demo or Service Overview:
  • Core requirements
  • What is Critical?
  • What is nice to have versus a “need”? How can other teams benefit?
  • Can it replace/enable a consolidation (tech focus)?
5. Key Takeaways
  • Key information around internal bandwidth, who’s driving the initiative, how they process information/change, etc.
  • Is there a legal or infosec process?
